headline: 3 Events That Could Upend This Market
summary: U.S. equities continue to trade at all-time highs despite the continued conflict in the Middle East and the effective Strait of Hormuz closure. Read what investors need to know.

headline: GM’s US manufacturing investments surpass $6B in one year
summary: The company’s latest commitments totaling $830 million will support SUV and truck production at major facilities in Michigan and Ohio.

headline: Ford expects $1.3B tariff refund, but supply chain pressure remains
summary: The automaker is still prepping for a $1 billion hit from tariffs in 2026 while projecting sizable commodity headwinds.

headline: Used EV Sales Surge In US As Iran War Drives Oil Spike— Americans Snap Up Sub-$25,000 Models
summary: Used EV sales rose nearly 28% in March in the U.S. as gas prices increase and leases end, new research data showed.
